### Preferred term labels, synonyms, suggested definitions, references, parent terms
* The targeted terms and their labels, synonyms come from [this table.](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1QrXvmsiCPqFQy6ZMHJQiE2rySrhmbQ1TE7GgDsg9ZFk/edit?gid=695544266#gid=695544266)

### Priority organs

```tsv
1.	 eye
2.	 heart
3.	 kidney
4.	 large intestine
5.	 liver
6.	 lung
7.	 pancreas
8.	 skin of body
9.	 small intestine
10.	 spleen 
```

### Remain be added
* as of [2024-12-24](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1zvY1smk9FvhPorn3raqQss7nYkEFQOOSfVGmBbwiLdQ/edit?gid=2125289498#gid=2125289498): **659**.
* as of [2025-01-09](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1zvY1smk9FvhPorn3raqQss7nYkEFQOOSfVGmBbwiLdQ/edit?gid=2125289498#gid=2125289498): **586**.
* as of [2025-01-27](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1zvY1smk9FvhPorn3raqQss7nYkEFQOOSfVGmBbwiLdQ/edit?gid=2125289498#gid=2125289498): **568**.
